resources.string: Sorry, this App cannot be used in this area.
"Due to policy limitation, your area cann't log on to use, please contact the dealer."
"This program can't be watched in this area."
Your device is not compatible with this app.
EA2-Login failed, your TV box cannot be used, please contact customer service. Customer service: %1$s
Login failed, your account has been frozen, if you have any questions, please contact the customer service.
Incorrect username or password,please try again
Please enter an account number or email address
Tips：Please bind with your personal real email, otherwise you will lose your account.
Login failed, please try again or contact your dealer.
Login timeout, please try again later！
Failed to login, please try again
Logout failed, please try again or contact your dealer.
This email does not support sending verification codes, so please use a different email.
The account or password is incorrect, please login again！
Please confirm whether you operate for yourself? If not, in order to ensure the security of the account, you are advised to modify the password!
The system has detected that your account has been logged on to other devices!
A link to reset your password will be sent to your email within 5 minutes. Please pay attention to check!
You need to input your personal email, not customer service email!
That version is out of service.
Sorry, this activation code has been used. Please contact your dealer or activation code to purchase.
Failed to activate! This activation code was already used
Activation fails! You already have used other special redemption codes
Congratulations, this activation code has been activated successfully!
Tips: You can go to <b>Profile-> Adult Content<b> to controls whether the category is displayed in the live channels
Now the Adult Category are invisible in the channel list
Now the Adult Category is visible in the channel list
If you want to watch this content, please enter your account password:
You need your account password to make Adult Channels visible again:
You need your Parental control password to make Adult Channels visible again:
This password can be used to retrieve the parental control password and log in to other devices.
Go to the Profile-> Account security to bind your email first.
You need to go to Profile-> Account security to set the account password first.

string.name: adult_return_channel
string.Data: Returning to the homepage in <font color=#ff3333>%1$s</font>

resources.string: The parental control password can be used to unlock adult content switch and locked channels.
To protect the well being of young people, please set your parental control
Are you sure you want to disable the adult content? If you disable this category it will become invisible in the channel list.
* Next time if you want to access Adult Channels you should come here on the Profile page to enable this content.
Go to the profile page to turn on adult content if you want to watch the Live adult channel.
Please go to \"Profile\"-> \"Account security\"-> \"Restriction switch\" to open the restriction switch!
Your APP will be out of date in 7 days
You are currently logged in with a mobile account, which is not supported on the TV. For more details, please go \"Profile->Help Center\".
You are not a VIP member, be a member and to enjoy our content.
Your service is not activated, please contact your seller.
Your VIP has expired, you can keep watching after renewing it
Your service has expired, please contact your seller.
You have not yet bound your account, please go to bind first!

The activation link will be sent to your email within 5 minutes. Please go to the mailbox to complete the activation and binding, and exit the application to re-enter after the operation is completed. If you didn’t find it, please check your spam mail first!
For your security, please bind your email to this account.
Go to Account security to bind your account!
Please search using a keyword or the movie title
We will send the purchase link to your email!
-Your device is abnormal, please contact your reseller.
"-This APP can't be used on this device."
"-This program can't be watched in this region"
-Unable to play, please exit APP and try again
-Unable to play, please exit APP and try again
-Failed to visit, please consult your dealer.
-This version has been discontinued. Click the button below to update to the latest version to continue using it. Or click the link below to download the latest version: %1$s
-Sorry, this App cannot be used in this region.
-Sorry, this App cannot be used in this region.
-Access failed, please exit the App and try again
-Access failed! Please send a feedback and try again later
-Your device is abnormal, please exit and retry.
-Access failed, please exit the App and try again
-Access failed! Please send a feedback and try again later
-Access failed, please exit APP and try again
-Access failed, please exit the APP and try again or contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please exit APP and try again
-Unable to play, please try again later
-Unable to play, please contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please try again later
-The current network is poor, it is recommended to switch to another network and try.
-Unable to play, please contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please try again later
-Failed to play, please consult your dealer.
-Unable to play, please try again later
-Unable to play, please contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please try again later
-Unable to play, please consult your reseller
-Unable to play, please contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please contact customer service %1$s
-Unable to play, please exit APP and try again
-Unable to play, please consult your reseller
-Unable to play, please exit APP and try again
-Unable to play, please try again later
-Service is not activated, please consult your reseller
-Service is not activated, please consult your reseller
-Service has expired, please consult your reseller
-Service is not activated, please consult your reseller
-Service is not activated, please consult your reseller
-Failed to connect,please exit APP and try again.
,Please do not mark the same program in the Favorites.
,The system is abnormal, please try again later.
,The system is abnormal, please try again later.
,The system is busy, please exit and re-enter.
,Failed to play, please change channel and back.
,Failed to play, please change channel and back.
Failed to connect, please exit and retry.
Update failed, click the link above to download.
,The redemption code is already used.Go to Exchange History to see the redemption result
,Failed to use the exchange code, Restricted(limited) area!
Failed to activate! This activation code is invalid, please recheck it. Any questions, contact the salesman.
Or click the link below to download %1$s
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Please, turn on the parental control switch
The adult content switch is off!
The adult content switch is on! Pay attention to the program not for children under 18 years old!
Your APP will be out of date in %1$d days

A telesync (TS) is a bootleg recording of a film recorded in a movie theater, quality may be not suitable for watching. If you choose to watch it anyway, consider that you have been informed before hands about the quality of this content.
Do you want to cancel all the subscriptions on %s ?
• Bound email/mobile number can give %1$d days of membership time.
• A bound account can be used to log in on other devices.
We recommend that you bind your email because
You already have subscribed to the program %s at %s, do you want to change it to program %s?
Congratulations, you got %1$s days of free trial
Your free trial is over. You can watch the free content available in the [Free] category, you can also get %1$d days of service time for free if you bind your email!
This logo represents the current channel support playback
Press the button to switch back to channel list or to switch program
Press the button to select and switch functions, such as screen ratio and problem feedback
Added a password reset function for parental control, which can be used to reset your password in case you forget it.
Press Number Key to Collect or Cancel Collected Programs

Press the button to access the live announcement and
return to the program list page of the current channel.(Live reservation or return play)
Go here to see the current events
We have optimized the VOD search and filter function for VOD content
Hey you, check out this page we added new functions
Click here to open the Parental control switch to enable adult content
Press the button, to use favorites, sort, return to the previous, block channel functions
Have you seen this new function? Click here to check it out!
Click here to view the order records and redeem records
The parent control switch is here.
You can change the subtitle setting function in here.
Click here, you can use the mobile phone to scan the QR code to download or log in to the mobile APP, try it out!
Click here to get the application service duration using the redemption code
Click here, you can manage passwords, emails, and parental control options, all in one place, convenient and fast.
Click here to add this program to the subscription list
Added thumbnail function for VOD contents. Press <font color=#ff9500>[>]</font> to preview thumbnails. Try it out!
You can now access the subtitles and audio options by clicking on the [language] button.
Press the button to choose to use more functions (e.g. multi-track function)
Press the down key to choose more functions (including audio, subtitles, player options, etc.)
If the video cannot be played, you can try to switch the player options!
SMS verification has been sent to your phone %s
This TV show that you subscribed will begin in %s seconds, on Channel: %s. Program: %s.
Your membership is over. You can use a redeem code to renew the membership or do an online renewal and bind your email to receive %1$d days of service time.

Your free trial is over. You can go to the Profile-Account Management Page to bind your email. If the binding is successful, you will receive %1$d days of service time. Or you can go to the [Free zone] to watch some free content.

Your membership is over. You can go to the Profile-Account Management Page to bind your email. If the binding is successful, you will receive %1$d days of service time. Or you can go to the [Free zone] to watch some free content.
Insert a USB storage device to download movies, and the downloaded content can be played on other devices.
Do you want to delete this video from the external storage?
"You have not downloaded any content yet, go and download the video you like~ The downloaded content can be played on other devices"
This video has been downloaded %1$d%%, Sure you want to delete it?
Tip: You can check the download progress in the Profile -> Download list
Download failed due to the external USB storage has insufficient space
Download failed, the video cannot be downloaded
The downloaded content will be saved to your external storage, please connect to the USB storage device first
"Network Error Please check your network connection and try again"
1. You can only download one video each time, and the maximum download rate is %1$s/S
2. To ensure your playback experience, the download will be paused while you are watching.
3. Do not unplug the U disk during the downloading process.
1. The downloaded video has been saved to the external storage
Download completed,The app will exit after upgraded, please restart it.
The app will exit after upgraded, please restart it.
Unable to play, please open directly from the file manager
The current download queue is full (%1$d)! Please delete some before adding more.
This video has been added to the download list, please do not download it repeatedly
Download failed, please try again later
Select the number of episodes to download
Download failed due to the external USB storage has insufficient space
The email address has been bound and you can log in directly with this email.
Please remember your account/ e-mail and password, thank you!

string.name: email_binding_success
string.Data: Congratulations, the e-mail <font color=#ffaa00>%s</font> is successfully bound!

resources.string: This email has already been linked
Successfully recovered the password, please keep your account and password safe, thank you!
The verification code has been sent to your email %1$s
Failed to activate! System information acquisition failed, please recheck it. Any questions, contact the salesman.
Press the OK button to play the \"Playback\" or to book \"Upcoming programs\"
No browser can be redirected. Please check and try again.
This channel has been taken down
"App crashed, please exit and try again. If can't solve it, you can contact customer service email: %1$s"

You have been using the app for 4 hours in a row. For your physical and mental health, we recommend that you take a break. After <font color=#ff8300>%s</font> S, the application will automatically exit. If you want to continue using it, please click OK.
Failed to activate, please check the code and re-enter. Any questions, contact the salesman.
When playing a video, appears black screen or video is out of sync.
Can not play a video (keeps streaming with good network speed).
The playback quality is blurred and the resolution is too low.
Black screen, audio but no picture.
EPG information empty or with error.
There is \"No Signal\" or black screen.
There is no sound or the volume is too low.
Your screen is freezing or glitching.
Thank you for your feedback, we will deal with it as soon as possible
Audio and video are out of sync, no sound.
Abnormal exit or the app has stopped while playing a video.
Audio and video are not synchronized when you play a video.
When playing a video, it appears black screen or the video is not synchronized.
Image resolution is not suitable (compressed, stretched).
"Can't play a video (not enough internet speed)."
Error in the content of the program details page.
The playback quality is blurred and the resolution is too low.

string.name: filter_back_key_hint
string.Data: Press <font color=#ffaa00>[BACK]</font> button to return to the top of the page

resources.string: Sorry! No media found, please try another content.
New version found and upgrading in the background automatically.
"Can't download? Please contact customer service for the latest version of the application."
You can go to the app store to download the latest version or contact customer service to get the latest version of the app.
Your free trial is over. You can watch the free content available in the [Free] category, you can also get X days of service time for free if you bind your email/phone number!
Frequent operation, please try again later!
"Please contact your dealer to get an activation code.Or contact wuliang@gmail.com(Or visit http://192.168.1.10) if you can't get contact with your dealer."
Failed to obtain the installation package, please contact customer service (md5)
This source uses h265 encoding, hardware does not support, it is recommended to use the latest hardware products.
This source uses h265 encoding, 4K quality, hardware does not support, it is recommended to use the latest hardware products.
Have an activation code? Use it now
Too frequently, please try again later
Too many attempts，please try again after 5 minutes！
Please input an 16 digit activation code
Insufficient disk space. If the installation fails, please clear the disk space and then download and install again.
Your memory or disk space is insufficient, please clean up!
Every time you invite a friend, you will get <font color=#ffaa00>7 days of free VIP</font> and more rewards.
Your friends will get <font color=#ffaa00>30 days of free VIP.</font>
Invite friends and get free VIP
Please scan the code to participate in the event
Take out your phone, take a photo and share it with your friends.
Note: This QR code contains personal information, please do not share it at will!
Failed to activate! The app is abnormal, please exit and restart it. Any questions, contact the salesman.
This is the latest version V%1$s
Not less than 6 characters, letters/numbers only
Your service is valid for 1 day
Press [Menu] or long - press [OK] to open
*After you finish the binding process, the adult category will be hidden. If you want this category to be displayed, please go to the Profile page to turn it on.
Scan the QR code to send suggestions or feedback.
Scan the QR code to send suggestions or feedback.
Please enter the first letter to search
Loading failed, please exit and try again
Are you sure you want to log out?
If the playback video is not accurate, please adjust the playback progress bar.
Load failure！Please exit and try again.
Playback unavailable, please try again later.
Please go the channels [Premier] to watch the live game
"Network Error Please check your network connection and try again"
Press [EXIT] to return to the beginning
Subscribed. We will notify you 10 minutes before the game starts.
Insufficient memory, the application may not work properly.Please close other apps and clean the cache to free up some memory. You can reopen the app after you do that.
Use the arrow keys to navigate, press the [OK] button to select
Thanks for your feedback. We will analyze it for you as soon as possible!
You have a stable connection, reconnecting...
The network connection failed. Please check your network.
Network connection failed, please check your router.
Network timed out, please try again later!
The system time zone/time is incorrect and failed to obtain EPG, please reset the system time zone time!
"You don't have any videos in your favorites list yet. Go and select your favorite videos now!"
This show has been taken down
"You don't have any videos in your List yet. Subscribe to movies or series you are interested in, so you won't miss any new updates"
Or click the link below to download:
The download timed out.Please exit the app, check your internet connection and try again.
Or go to the app market to download and install the latest version of the app

The system has detected that you have turn on the <Do not keep activity> option, this function will cause the Xuper application to crash or white screen, in order to ensure the normal usage of your device, please turn off this option, thank you!
Login failed, your account has reached the maximum number of login devices, please log in again!
The original password is wrong, please re-enter it.
Your APP is out of date
Failed to activate! This code is not for your area. Any questions, please contact the salesman .
The password format is wrong, please re-enter it.
Enter the four digit password, Re-enter this password when you enter this zone next time.
Enter a four-digit password. You will be needed to watch the blocked programs.
Failed to redirect，please follow the path prompted to manually enter the settings.
Your account has been activated in %1$s and is already active for %2$d days
Your subscription has expired, please contact the reseller
By binding an email/mobile phone number you can receive an additional %1$d days of service time, and also can be used to log in on other devices
Fail to load the exchange record

string.name: personal_email_retrieve_tip
string.Data: Recuperar el clave con email: <font color=#ffaa00>%s</font>

resources.string: Enter a new password (6-12 alphanumeric combination)
Password (6-12 digits with letter and number)
Please go to \"Profile\" to renew your VIP
You have no exchange records yet
You have no purchase records yet
Fail to load the purchase record
Failed to submit link, please try again!
After setting the password, you can login on other devices
You can set the login password when you are binding the e-mail or mobile phone
You can set the login password when you are binding the e-mail
You need to bind your e-mail before continuing
I have read and agree to the
Scan code to quickly log in or download the Xuper mobile phone
Please go ahead to set up the password!
You need to bind your e-mail before continuing
After the email is linked successfully, exit the application to update your email.
"Binding for the first time, will give you a free %1$d days of trial. "
Your Trial account will expire on %1$s
After you link your email to the account you can connect to different devices
After binding the phone, you can use your phone number to log in on different devices
Your account is not a VIP account yet
A link to reset your password will be sent to your email within 5 minutes. Please pay attention to check! If you didn’t find it, please check your spam mail first!
The verification code field cannot be empty.
The phone number has been bound!
Please remember your account/phone number and password, thank you!

string.name: phone_binding_success
string.Data: Congratulations! Mobile phone number <font color=#ffaa00>%s</font> binding successfully!

resources.string: Please enter your mobile phone number!

string.name: phone_retrieve_tip
string.Data: Favor verificar numero de celular: <font color=#ffaa00>%s</font>

resources.string: The verification code has been sent to your mobile phone, please check it.
Your mobile phone has reached the upper limit of get the number of SMS verification code. If you have any questions, please contact with customer service.
In system maintenance, please use other methods first
SMS verification code has been sent to your mobile phone %1$s
Bind e-mail or mobile phone to log in on other devices
Please login or bind your email first, and then enjoy the service
You are not a member, you can enjoy more content by becoming a member
You are not a member, please contact your dealer.
You are not a member, you can enjoy more content by becoming a member.Press [MENU] key to buy>
Your VIP has expired, you can keep watching after renewing it
Your membership has expired. Click the [MENU] button to purchase>
You are currently playing 4K programs, the experience will be better with bandwidth over 20Mbps
Please scan the QR code or purchase the package through email!
Press the “Menu” button to enter the activation code
The purchase link has been sent to your E-mail, please verify your E-mail to complete the purchase！If you don’t find it, please check your spam mail!
Scan the QR code below to renew your subscription
New version detected, update to v%s
Modified the blocked time failed, please try again
Fail to block this channel, please try again
The block period you inputed is incorrect
The current program has been unblocked
Fail to unblock this channel, please try again
Dear User, you can download our Mobile App in
. Once installed, you can login by scanning the QR CODE, located in the \"Profile\" page.
The Scan function in the mobile App, is located in \"Profile\" page, look for the scan Button
i in the upper right corner. After you click it on the Scan button, aim at the QR Code in your TV to automatically login in mobile.
exchange code for special package can only be used once!
If you have any questions, please contact your dealer or the place where you purchased the activation code!
Please make sure if the redeem code you entered is correct. If it is correct and still no use, please contact your reseller or the place you purchased the activation code!
You are already a member, you can only use this Trial account activation code after your free trial period and membership expires
This redeem code can only be used in the Mobile App
The page has expired. Please exit and re-enter the app
If you have any questions, please contact your reseller or the place where you purchased the activation code!
Failed to use the redeem code, Restricted(limited) area!
The redeem code is already used.Go to \"Exchange History\" to see the redeem result
Successful use of redeem code .Go to \"Exchange History\" to see the results
This show is an adult program, Are you 18 years old?
This channel is limited and can not be blocked or unlocked!
The password has been retrieved successfully. Please take care of your account and password. Thank you!
There is an abnormal program in the device, which is a security risk, please try to restore factory settings
The purchase link of the package has been sent to your E-mail,please visit it and purchase.
Network connection timeout, please check it and try again.

"Xuper TV is dedicated to providing users with many high-quality resources. Here you will find thousands of movies, series, anime, and live, all in one place. We deliver a stable, smooth, diverse, and continuously updated viewing experience, offering free content for your enjoyment. All content developed and produced is based on reference materials publicly available through video-sharing platforms. The copyright of all videos and images remains with their respective creators and platforms."
If you have questions, please contact %1$s.
Scan the QR code to send suggestions or feedback.
New version available, do you want to update to the latest version?
Sorry! No media found, please try another content.
"You need to grant access to the storage in order to use our App. Please allow acess going:"
Setting-> Apps-> Xuper-> Permissions->Storage-> Allow/ Enable.
Setting-> Apps-> Xuper-> Permissions->Music and audio-> Allow/ Enable.
Subscribed, you can find your subscriptions in \"Profile->My List\". Reminder: We will remind you when we release new related content.
Activate successfully, will work out in 10 minutes. Enjoy your APP for %1$s days.Please exit and re-apply.
System is busy, please try again later!
Failed to activate! System error, please exit and restart it. Any questions, contact your seller.
The new device model already supports the thumbnail function, please purchase a new device to enjoy a better viewing experience!
Purchase a membership to experience the thumbnail function!

"For the security of your account and better use experience, please bind the mailbox before continuing to use. You can use this email to log in, and it will sync your "favorites and (subscribe to) lists on other devices

string.name: tip_force_bind_normal
string.Data:
For the security of your account and better use experience, please use email binding within %1$d days.
You can use this email to log in, and it will synchronize your Favorites and Subscribe List on other devices.

resources.string: You can skip up to 400 pages each time.
Tip: The password format is a combination of 6-12 digits + letters, such as: 12345a
Bind to use Xuper for free
If you have any questions, please contact: %s
"Can't download? Please contact customer service for the latest version of the application."
Failed to activate! This activation code was already used, please recheck it. Any questions, contact the salesman .
",You' ve saved too much content! Please go to the favorites list to manage it."
,You have subscribed to too much content, please manage the subscription list in advance!
,In system maintenance, please use other methods first.
,Your mobile phone has reached the upper limit of get the number of SMS verification code. If you have any questions, please contact with customer service.
,The verification code has been sent to your mobile phone, please check it.
Login timed out, please exit the app and re-enter
Dear user the current version has been discontinued, we have released a new version for you! You can update to the latest version to continue enjoying the app.
Allows you to login in two devices simultaneously.( 1 phone and 1 Tv box)
In order to become a member, you need to bind your account
For the security of your account, please bind your email before purchasing a plan. After the binding is successful, you can get %1$d days of extra service time and make a purchase.
Are you sure you want to delete all records?
Subtitle failed, please try again later
Select the problem you encountered, and press OK to submit the feedback
(If the video cannot be played, you can try to switch the player options.)
To enjoy the best & original picture quality,we suggest you to connect to 4K+10 Bit+HDR screens.
exclusive AV1 program source is playing
no program source available, please contact customer service %1$s
Please try again using the name of the movie, TV series, director or actor for a more precise results
To search for live channels, go to the live channels in full-screen mode
Search for movies, series or directors.
No video related to \"%1$s\" was found

" 1. For your account security, please change your password in time. 2. Modify the password before you can use the account normally. 3. The password format is a combination of 6-12 digits + letters, such as: 12345a"
You have not agreed to access permissions, please go to settings to enable it.
